scripts.build: chant build src --lexicon gcp -o config.yaml && chant build src --lexicon k8s -o k8s.yaml
scripts.status: kubectl get pods -n microservice && kubectl get ingress -n microservice && kubectl get daemonsets -n gke-logging && kubectl get daemonsets -n gke-monitoring
scripts.deploy: npm run build && npm run deploy-infra && npm run configure-kubectl && npm run load-outputs && npm run build:k8s && npm run apply && npm run wait && npm run status
